name: Harvest Angel of Doom
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ハーヴェスト
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
During your Main Phase: You can destroy this card, and if you do, add 1 "Black Horn of Heaven" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Harvest Angel of Doom" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is Normal or Pendulum Summoned: You can add 1 "Horn of Heaven" from your Deck to your hand. If this card is Tributed: You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone. You can only use each effect of "Harvest Angel of Doom" once per turn.
pend_eff: During your Main Phase: You can destroy this card, and if you do, add 1 "Black Horn of Heaven" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Harvest Angel of Doom" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Pendulum Summoned: You can add 1 "Horn of Heaven" from your Deck to your hand. If this card is Tributed: You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone. You can only use each effect of "Harvest Angel of Doom" once per turn.
